text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: My mother is a chronologist… so we had a magnificent study at home. There were all sorts of 『History Books』 there—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: When I was still young, what I became especially obsessed with was… the 『Racing History』 of Horsegirls.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: There was deep drama in racing history… and it wasn't something that began and ended with just the individual girl—it was a woven history, and the drama built upon it.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …I couldn't help but be excited. By that grand "picture scroll" that only grew larger the more I learned about the past.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: History is a "picture." The countless "dots" drawn by everyone involved in racing connect, becoming lines that bring it to the surface—a massive, single picture.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf marked a brilliant dot. But beyond that—there was Tokai Teio. With them linked together, the picture was complete.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Special Week, Grass Wonder, El Condor Pasa… If any of them from that generation were missing, it wouldn't have been such a beautiful picture.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …By the time I realized those facts, I was already… captivated by it. By history. And—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I wanted to be inside that picture.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Gran and Loves will be drawing their dots from here on out. 
I want to do the same, but…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I'm still lacking. Completely. Compared to the predecessors 
who wove history… and compared to the girls who will weave it from now on.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…And I hate that. 
I can't forgive myself for lacking. Because—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I want to weave that kind of history too.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
—I want to make someone feel as excited as I was back then. 
That's what I've been thinking…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……Ah. I-I'm sorry…! 
Rambling on all by myself…
choice_data_list: Not at all. …Thank you for sharing
No. …Thank you for sharing

text_block_list.text:
I understood why she was pushing herself so hard. 
—Because she had a dream. And it seemed she didn't 
want to spare any effort to achieve it.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Of course, 
I know I'm talking big, but…
choice_data_list: That's not true at all. —Not at all

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Trainer.
Because I actually felt it was a "waste" when I watched her in the mock race. If just one thing changes, she could become a huge star—I was certain of it.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Umm. Actually, in two weeks, there's a Tracen Academy tour. It's an event where we invite racing fans…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I'll be running in the event race held there. 
So, I don't want to show a poor performance…
choice_data_list: I see, so that's why…

text_block_list.text:
…After hearing about her dream and realizing her passion, 
the words naturally spilled from my lips.
choice_data_list: If you'd like, could you let me help you?
If you'd like, could you let me help you?

text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I asked Chrono Genesis to show me 
some of her past race footage. …In every race, she ran 
with a pensive expression.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
This one is the 『Hanshin Juvenile Fillies』… 
I positioned myself based on the race Buena Vista won.
choice_data_list: <size=34>There's space on the inside too, but why not there?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Honestly, I was torn. The year after Buena, 
a Horsegirl who charged from the inside won. 
So I wondered which one I should reference…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
But, I stayed on the outside. Looking at past mock races, number 8 running on the inside had a tendency to drift. 
To win here, I had to—
choice_data_list: <size=36>…Do you always think this much while running?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Yes. History is "established fact"… 
so I think it'd be a waste not to utilize it…
choice_data_list: I see…

text_block_list.text:
Watching Chrono Genesis's races along with her commentary, 
I realized something. And that was—
choice_data_list: <size=34>You might be overthinking things during the race!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: O-Overthinking, you say…?
Her deep knowledge of racing history is her weapon. But—she tries so hard to reference it that it gives the impression she's getting too stuck in her own head.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Stop thinking so much! Let's just run freely!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I-I see… freely. 
Yes, I'll try to keep that in mind…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (A run that doesn't reference history, a run that's uniquely mine… Freely… Without thinking about anything—)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaaahhhhh!!!
choice_data_list: T-This is—!!

text_block_list.text:
I called out 『Good work』 to a breathless Chrono Genesis. 
After that, I shared my thoughts on her run just now.
choice_data_list: <size=28>A massive breakaway might be taking "free" a bit too far…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry…! I was just thinking about running freely, 
and before I knew it, it ended up like this… Ugh…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I've only ever run by referencing history… 
So when you tell me not to reference anything, well…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what a run uniquely mine 
is even supposed to look like…
choice_data_list: <size=36>I don't think you even need to think about that</size>

text_block_list.text: Running naturally without thinking about anything—that should be 『Her Run』 That's why it really is important to "not think about anything", but…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I-I see… so I don't even need to be conscious of running 
in my own unique way…
…………
choice_data_list: <size=32>(She still looks like she's pondering over something…)</size>
<size=32>(She still looks like she's pondering over something…)</size>

text_block_list.text: In the end, just telling her 『Run without thinking!』 probably wasn't enough advice to solve her problem. In that case, I needed to give her more useful advice—
…I want to, but I can't think of anything right now. —If so, what should I do? If I were to look for the answer that a history lover like her seeks…
choice_data_list: …Shall we go to the Horsegirl Museum?
…Want to go to the Horsegirl Museum?

text_block_list.text:
Chrono Genesis has walked alongside history. 
It's difficult to ask her to separate herself from 
history during a race. In that case—
choice_data_list: <size=40>Let's rethink what history means to you</size>
<size=40>Let's rethink what history means to you</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I see… 
What history means to me is— Ah.
choice_data_list: Hmm? Find something?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: No, it's just… there's a special exhibit, so it caught my eye… It wasn't here the last time…
choice_data_list: You're right. Want to take a quick look?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… Y-Yes…! 
If that's alright with you, Trainer…
We watched the video exhibit titled 『The Path to Back-to-Back Grand Prix Victories』 There, we saw the famous Horsegirls who carved their names into history—
